summary: The diff partially addresses the BuildRequest requirements. REQ-1 is implemented with .env.example and .gitignore for environment variable configuration, and the frontend code checks for VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID. REQ-2 appears unaddressed as no backend OAuth configuration changes are evident. REQ-3 is partially addressed through frontend connection flow implementation, but no test files or backend OAuth callback verification changes are present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify Google OAuth credentials are correctly configured in the backend for the OAuth callback flow
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend OAuth configuration, credential verification, or callback processing logic are visible in the diff. The backend/main.mo file shows existing OAuth types and credential storage structures but no new verification or configuration logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Test the complete Google account connection flow from button click through OAuth callback to successful connection status display
missing_requirements.reason: No test files added or modified. While the frontend implements the connection UI and OAuth initiation logic, no automated tests or test documentation verifying the complete flow are present.
